actions.text: Referred to the Committee on the Judiciary, and in addition to the Committees on Homeland Security, Ways and Means, and Financial Services, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.

official_title: To designate Antifa as a domestic terrorist organization, to counter domestic terrorism and organized political violence, and for other purposes.
